name: Miner Rush Game
description: Miner Rush is an exciting endless runner adventure that takes you deep into underground tunnels filled with gold, gems, and hidden treasures. Step into the boots of a brave miner and race through dangerous caves, narrow tracks, and rocky pathways while collecting valuable resources. Dodge obstacles, avoid collapsing tunnels, and keep moving forward to achieve the highest score in this fast-paced mining adventure.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
